sentences.arabic: أَصْبَحَتِ الْهَوَاتِفُ الذَّكِيَّةُ جُزْءًا أَسَاسِيًّا مِنْ حَيَاتِنَا الْيَوْمِيَّةِ.
sentences.translation: Pametni telefoni su postali osnovni dio našeg svakodnevnog života.
sentences.translationEn: Smartphones have become an essential part of our daily lives.

sentences.arabic: نَسْتَخْدِمُ هَذِهِ الْأَجْهِزَةَ لِلتَّوَاصُلِ مَعَ الْأَصْدِقَاءِ وَالْعَائِلَةِ.
sentences.translation: Koristimo ove uređaje za komunikaciju s prijateljima i porodicom.
sentences.translationEn: We use these devices to communicate with friends and family.

sentences.arabic: كَمَا تُسَاعِدُنَا التَّطْبِيقَاتُ الْمُخْتَلِفَةُ فِي تَنْظِيمِ الْوَقْتِ وَالْعَمَلِ.
sentences.translation: Također, različite aplikacije nam pomažu u organizaciji vremena i posla.
sentences.translationEn: Also, various applications help us organize time and work.

sentences.arabic: يُمْكِنُنَا الْآنَ الْقِيَامُ بِالْكَثِيرِ مِنَ الْمَهَامِّ بِضَغْطَةِ زِرٍّ وَاحِدَةٍ.
sentences.translation: Sada možemo obaviti mnogo zadataka jednim pritiskom na dugme.
sentences.translationEn: We can now perform many tasks with a single click of a button.
